resources.string: The Lua Addon sources combat data from the game. It's what allows for native-only functionality like target-based debuff tracking, raid management, and in-game visual/audible effects. If you remove the lua addon from the game features won't work as intended.
Display the main / co-raid member count when players join or leave the raid.
Display 'Charmed' targets in game chat window.
Display 'Silenced' targets in game chat window.
Display 'Distressed' targets in game chat window.
Show a [Heart Mark] over highest-value enemy healers. (Top 3 enemy healers based on cumulative PvP healing.)
Show a [Crossed-Swords Mark] over highest-value enemy DPS. (Top 3 enemy DPS based on cumulative PvP damage.)
Show a [Shield Mark] over high-value enemy CC mages to stay away from. (Top 3 enemy CC based on cumulative PvP crowd control time.)
Shower a God ray over sacrifice dancers while they are channeling. (Easier to spot than default game effect.)
Show a [Purple Dot] over player's heads to indicate that they are Charmed.
Show a [Black Dot] over player's heads to indicate that they are Silenced.
Show a [Blue Dot] over player's heads to indicate that they are Distressed.
Allow Ode to Recovery to count as heals

Please confirm that you see the correct ArcheRage documents directory below. Your game's documents directory was detected automatically. If you don't see the correct directory, or the text below is red, you should report a bug.

Uninstalling via this menu cleanly removes the Lua addon from the game folder, it also closes the app, and triggers the regular un-installation process. If you decide to cancel the installer, opening raid framer again will allow you to re-install the Lua component automatically.
Please Specify Directory (It's the folder that has a system.cfg file inside it!)
Switch characters in-game to update this value automatically.

The Lua Addon has been safely removed from your game folder.
**HOWEVER**
You should still complete the uninstallation of the main application by uninstalling "Raid Framer" via the Windows Control Panel. (that's this app) If you don't uninstall, and decide to open the app again, the Lua addon will be copied back to your game folder in the interest of the addon still functioning. (at your desire) Thanks! Exiting now!
Enable DPS/HEALS/CC Mini-Graph. Shows performance over time.
Choose up to three additional categories to display as columns on the combat overlay. These appear alongside Damage, Heals, and CC.
Auto-fade icon controls when the cursor leaves the overlay.
Enable OSRS-style split-chat window overlay. (Coming Soon)
Automatically hide game overlay's while tabbed-out of the game. Doesn't apply to tool-tips (those with a title-bar).
Allow PvE Damage to be counted towards DPS/Kill Counters. (Useful for solo players who want to see their damage output against PvE targets)
Enable [HOLD TAB] to bring-up the official in-game event schedule website as an overlay. (Coming Soon)
I'd prefer to use Sadly.io for in-game schedule data. (Coming Soon)
Enable dragon breath detector and counter overlay. (Note: You still have be in 100 meter range of the dragon rider to witness the breaths, this isn't magic friends!) (Coming Soon)

Are you sure you want to uninstall the Lua Addon? This will remove the game integration.
The app will notify the in-game addon to shut down before removing files.
Shutting down Lua addon and releasing file locks...
Your character and faction are determined automatically when you switch characters. Raid Framer uses this information to deduce friendly and hostile characters over time.
Toggle additional overlay features and parsing options.
Some friends may wish to adjust the transparency and color of their overlays.
Note: Restart the app for language changes to take full effect.
Combat events are being recorded to %1$s
A previous recording session was interrupted and has been discarded.
This will discard all recorded data from this session without saving. Lifetime totals will be reverted to their pre-session values.
Dedicated to all of our friends on the East and out in the virtual world. May this code be used for good, and not evil.
To the ArcheRage community for their support and feedback. ~
To the ArcheRage staff for their dedication and hard work. ~
To the ArcheRage developers for their continued support and updates. ~
No historical sessions for this player yet.
Dragon Breaths, Risos, Battle Pets and Other Creatures

Subscriptions let you create custom character name re-mappings. They're similar to filters, except subscriptions take precedence over all other sources. Use them to override game spell names, NPC names, or any other text in the combat log.
Filters from the web are combined with any local filters. If a web filter and a local filter disagree, the local filter takes precedence.
Searching for valid combat logs.. Results will appear here..
Press '+' to start a new recording session
Bro.. Try Adding at Least One Category..

You are viewing a replay of combat data from: %1$s
Live monitoring is disabled while viewing replays.
All window positions have been reset! Please remember: If you have alt-tab detection enabled, any overlays (those without a title bar) may not appear until you switch back to the game window.
Manage export output directory and options.
Include raw JSON formatted logs when exporting. (Uses disk space)
You are running the latest version
Checks github.com for new releases. No data is sent to any server.
Installing… the app will close and reinstall. You may need to relaunch the game afterwards.
Install complete! You can restart the app.

A new version (%1$s) is available.
You are currently on version %2$s.

The app will close, reinstall, and relaunch. You may need to relaunch the game afterwards.
Raid roster on the left, controls on the right, with nearby intel tucked neatly underneath.
Please join a raid to use raid management features. You must have the Lua Addon installed. Windows with title bars are not overlays, consider placing on another monitor to avoid covering the game UI.
Require at least some participation. (25k damage, 25k heals, or 25+ CC points)
Shows only players that have generated combat events nearby. Does not detect stealthed players.
Require participation (25k damage, 25k heals, or 25+ CC)

Export or import a seed table to share player data with other installations. This helps pre-populate player faction statuses, gear-scores, classes, and guild names for improved accuracy. Player names are hashed for privacy.

Would you like to apply the seed table from: %s
This will allow the app to use this seed table as a reference for player data.
The specified seed table file was not found: %s
